nasb.text: But she said, “Yes, Lord; but even the dogs feed on the crumbs which fall from their masters’ table.”

esv.text: She said, “Yes, Lord, yet even the dogs eat the crumbs that fall from their masters’ table.”

cnv.text: 她說：“主啊，是的，不過小狗也吃主人桌子上掉下來的碎渣。”

ccb.text: 妇人说：“主啊，不错，可是狗也吃主人饭桌上掉下来的碎渣呀！”

csbs.text: 妇人说：“是的，主啊！不过连小狗也吃得到主人桌子上掉下来的碎渣！”
